title: Fix profiles hot-reload test — m13-dbb DBB-008 flaky/failing
description: test/server/m13-dbb.test.js DBB-008 'onReload called when profiles change' is failing. The test mocks fetch with etag-1 and expects watchProfiles to call the onReload callback within 150ms, but reloaded remains null. Error: AssertionError: expected null not to be null at line 144. Investigate whether watchProfiles correctly detects etag changes and fires the callback. This is the only failing test (1/962).
